meta.source: external benchmark (published essays with real human grades, each verified absent from the training corpus)
meta.warning: Coarse, weak signal. Ranges overlap heavily; n=30; the raw p-value does not survive correction for the 6 splits tried. This is NOT a grade and must never be displayed as one. The 6-band point estimate this replaced failed outright — see docs/reports/score-estimate-negative-result.md.
